title: NX Roads and Skyscrapers
description: A set of building and road blocks to build your cities!!!
body:
The mod was inspired by the old [Realistic Road Mod](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fwww.9minecraft.net%252frealistic-road-mod%252f), which seems discontinued.

 

If you want to have nice roads in your Minecraft cities, and don't want to use complex texture packs, this will be the mod for you. Currently the mod **does not have crafting recipes for blocks** (only for the basic road block), it's meant for creative plays.

 

## The mod includes:

- 31 road blocks with white markings
- 31 road blocks with yellow markings
- 16 ramps with white markings and elevation of 1 block
- 6 ramps with yellow markings and elevation of 1 block
- 53 Solid Full Blocks:
- 2 colors of Concrete

> 3 colors of Granite
> 
> 8 colors of Marble
> 
> 3 colors of Cracked Pavement
> 
> 8 colors of Sidewalks
> 
> 7 colors of Stone
> 
> 6 colors of Stone Brick Cracked
> 
> 6 colors of Skyscraper Blocks
> 
> 4 colors of Wooden Ceiling Blocks
> 
> 6 colors of Wooden Floor Blocks
> 
- 33 Added Glass Full Blocks
> 11 types of Normal Skyscraper Glass Blocks
> 
> 11 types of Grey Skyscraper Glass Blocks
> 
> 11 types of Green Skyscraper Glass Blocks


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Keep in mind that I am working alone on this and it was initially made for my use only, so I cannot say when there will be updates.

</details>

To view the current issues please view the Known Issues page in Pages tab in [CurseForge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nx-roads-and-skyscrapers/pages/issues). If you find any issue with the mod, please use the Issue tab to create a ticket, or reach me in private in CurseForge.

### Future Plans includes, but are not limited to:
 
- More ramps with elevation of 1 block
- Longer ramps, for smoother slopes
- Street lighting
- Street Decorations
- Crafting Recipes - Not a priority at that stage
- Skyscraper unique decorations
